programme.desc: A disappointing loss at the science fair sends Sheldon's life in a new direction.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Inappropriate Sister
programme.desc: Phoebe works with the Salvation Army; Rachel questions Danny's closeness to his sister.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Boob Job
programme.desc: When Monica and Chandler are financially strapped, Monica secretly asks Joey for a loan.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Memorial Service
programme.desc: Ross and Chandler trade blows at each other's reputation over the Internet.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Routine
programme.desc: Joey and the gang get invited by Janine to the advance taping of a New Year's special.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Lottery
programme.desc: Monica and the gang purchase dozens of lottery tickets for the power ball jackpot.

programme.desc: Sheldon is bullied by an unlikely character and Mary and George disagree on how to handle the situation.

programme.title: Mom: Horny-Goggles and a Catered Intervention

programme.title: Mom: Soapy Eyes and a Clean Slate
programme.desc: Christy is on a journey to right the wrongs of her past but she has a blind spot when it comes to Baxter. Following Christy's example, Bonnie decides to come clean with Alvin about the terrible things she did to him over the years.

programme.title: Mom: Free Therapy and a Dead Lady's Yard Sale
programme.desc: Family secrets come out when Christy and Bonnie are asked to join Violet's therapy session.

programme.title: Mom: Godzilla and a Sprig of Mint
programme.desc: Christy's evening alone takes an unexpected turn when she meets her attractive, single neighbour, Andy. Also, Bonnie and Alvin's romantic plans are derailed by Alvin's ex-wife Lorraine.

programme.title: Full House: Joey Gets Tough
programme.desc: D.J. is unhappy when Joey puts his foot down and grounds her; Jesse goes on Danny's show.

programme.title: Full House: Triple Date
programme.desc: Danny arranges a triple date with Joey and Jesse but finds out his date once dated Jesse.

programme.title: Full House: Middle Age Crazy
programme.desc: Stephanie feels the loneliness and frustration of being the middle child.

programme.title: Full House: A Little Romance
programme.desc: D.J. learns the ups and downs of romance while bachelors Joey and Jesse are auctioned off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Weenies Allowed/ Squilliam Returns
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to get into the Salty Spitoon; Squidward's old rival comes to town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Welcome to Chum Bucket/ Frankendoodle
programme.desc: Mr. Krab loses SpongeBob's fry cook contract in a bet with Plankton and SpongeBob is forced to go work at the Chum Bucket; When SpongeBob and Pat discover a pencil from the surface, they begin to draw with it and everything they draw comes to life.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Picture Day/ Pat No Pay/ Blackjack
programme.desc: SpongeBob must attend Picture Day for the Boating School Year Book; Patrick steals.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Frozen Face Off
programme.desc: Everyone in Bikini Bottom is participating in a worm-sled race to the South Pole.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Making Bad
programme.desc: Nate is reunited with his do-gooder parents, who offer him a compelling and difficult choice.

programme.title: Movie: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Melman and Gloria attempt to leave Madagascar but wind up landing in Africa. Alex meets his family but struggles to communicate with them due to his easy life in the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: Top Elf: Who Will Be Top Elf?
programme.desc: The final three Elf-testants produce and star in their very own holiday-themed music video.

programme.title: The Loud House: A Dark and Story Night/ Sand Hassles
programme.desc: When the lights go out in the Loud House, the kids entertain themselves by taking turns telling parts of a story. Lucy and the Morticians' Club try to thwart plans for a school field trip to the beach.

programme.title: The Loud House: Snow Way Out/ Snow Way Down
programme.desc: Despite the heavy snowfall, Lana convinces the kids to go to the Burpin' Burger to meet her racecar driving hero. Lincoln goes on vacation with Clyde and realizes just how overprotective Clyde's dads are.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Escape from Beneath Glove World
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick are sent to jail in the underground tunnels of Glove World, leading to a daring escape.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: High Sea Diving/ Bottle Burglars
programme.desc: SpongeBob wants to be the first sponge to dive all the way up to the surface of the ocean. When SpongeBob Squidward accidentally let Plankton steal the secret formula, it's up to them to steal it back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Little Yellow Book/ Bumper to Bumper
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongebob BC
programme.desc: Thanks to the magic of an underwater thunderstorm, our neanderthal friends discover fire.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Executive Treatment / Squid Plus One
programme.desc: While trying to order a special sandwich, Patrick gets swept up in the fast paced world of business. Later, Squidward receives an invitation to a gallery opening and scrambles to find a friend to take with him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patchy the Pirate Presents the SpongeBob SquarePants Christmas Special
programme.desc: When Sandy tells the residents of Bikini Bottom about Christmas, SpongeBob wants to bring the holiday to the town. His enthusiasm is infectious, but everyone blames SpongeBob when Santa is a no show on Christmas morning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dunces and Dragons
programme.desc: After a freak jousting accident at a Medieval Times restaurant, SpongeBob and Patrick are transported to a medieval version of Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Avalanches and Volcanoes
programme.desc: Exploding glaciers, venomous snakes and ground crumbling earthquakes. How to survive being buried alive by a massive avalanche and what do when face-to-face with scorching lava erupting from a volcano is also featured.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Wildfires and Flash Floods
programme.desc: Blinding snow, suffocating sand and scorching flames. How to survive a raging inferno approaching and how to escape a car if caught in a flash flood and sinking fast.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Surviving the Outdoors
programme.desc: Real-life video from the great outdoors that tests skills against raging rapids, dangerous bears and a bug burrowing in an ear. How to survive a seven-story fall into a glacier and lasting six days in the hot desert with no food or water is featured.

programme.title: Mayday: Helicopter Down
programme.desc: Investigate a case where a Super Puma helicopter was making a routine journey to a North Sea oil platform. The travel took place during extreme weather conditions when in a flash, sixteen passengers and crew found themselves struggling to survive.

programme.title: Mayday: Desperate Escape
programme.desc: On August 2, 2005 Air France flight 358 burst into flames when it skidded off the runway in Toronto during a raging thunderstorm. More that 300 passengers and crew had only seconds to escape the burning plane.

programme.title: Mayday: Caution to the Wind
programme.desc: While taking off in a tropical storm, Singapore Airlines Flight 006 crashes at Taipei's Chang Kai-shek Airport. Investigators wonder if fierce winds blew the aircraft off course, until they find tire marks on a runway under construction.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: A tragic collision between two semis sends Bear and the crew from Ross into the fray; Nate and Andrew improvise after a load of lumber rolls on the 401, backing up traffic all the way to Quebec.

programme.title: Fat Guys in the Woods: Knife Skills in the Swamp
programme.desc: Creek and three buddies put a giant knife arsenal to the test in Florida's Dead Lakes swamp. They use their blades to construct a 'swamp nest' tree house, build a 'fire thong' and hack into some interesting wild edibles.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: A Snowy Mountain Misstep
programme.desc: Ryan Montoya falls 2000 feet off a mountain peak in Colorado. With a broken pelvis and dislocated elbow he must endure frigid winter temperatures and find a way to walk back to safety.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Snowmobile Desperation
programme.desc: Scott and Vivian Mayo travel to their remote camp outside Cantwell, Alaska. Two days into their trip, Scott heads out alone on his snowmobile to carve trails when he becomes disoriented in heavy fog.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: High Altitude Injury
programme.desc: Gregg Hein's descent from 14,000 foot Mt. Goddard becomes a nightmare struggle to survive when a boulder rolls into him and breaks his leg.

programme.title: Why Planes Crash: Sudden Impact

programme.title: Hoarders: Arline/ Carolyn

programme.title: Hoarders: Andrew/ Shania

programme.title: Hoarders: Andrew/ Lydia
programme.desc: Stuck in a hoarded house, with no job, no motivation and no direction, Andrew needs to control his hoarding to have a normal life. Lydia's son may be sent to a nursing home if she doesn't clean her house.

programme.title: Hoarders: Mary and Mary Ann
programme.desc: Mary has overstuffed her home and consignment shop, spending over $200,000; Mary Ann's husband threatens divorce.

programme.title: Hoarders: Hanna/ Kathy and Gary
programme.desc: Hanna has hoarded herself and her 200 chickens out of her house and lives with the chickens in a windowless, unheated trailer. Kathy and Gary have let 30 rabbits run loose inside their rented house.

programme.title: Hoarders: Glen/ Lisa
programme.desc: Twenty-five-hundred free-roaming rats have hoarded Glen out of his home and into a shed on his property. More than 30 cats roam freely through Lisa's cluttered home and she is threatened with eviction.

programme.title: Hoarders: Phyllis/ Janet
programme.desc: Phyllis' house is packed with a floor to ceiling collection of bags stuffed with dolls. Janet has to crawl over mountains of garbage to get to the one recliner where she eats and sleeps.

programme.title: Movie: The Green Mile
programme.desc: Death row guards at a penitentiary form an unusual relationship with an inmate who seems to possess extraordinary powers. They are faced with a moral dilemma when they come to believe the inmate may actually be innocent.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Irritable Vowel Syndrome
programme.desc: Learn what Q frequently eats for lunch during filming, why Murr hired a pastry chef to come to the set and what animals took part in a punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: So many shoppers in the candy aisle during 'Star Struck'. The celeb that was on set while the guys filmed 'Brain Games'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Find out which two Jokers know how to practice transcendental meditation and which boy band member the guys met at Carnegie Deli.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: Find out who keeps the tags on his jacket so he can return them, which crew member voices the 'sexy beast' commercial, and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a black thumb, what challenges the guys like so much they play when the cameras are off, and how long it took to zombie-fry the undead in Sal's sewer punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Find out which Jokers really wear glasses, how Q was injured the last time he wore his talking brush disguise and what Sal's sole business card actually says.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Why the slow-moving line at The Fast and the Furious ride made things harder for the guys, who officiated Joe's wedding, and why last-minute changes were needed for Murr's Tumblr punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out questions and trivia like why Q wore a wedding ring during a challenge, which crew member slapped him way too hard, and who has a history with the punishment guest.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Holiday Meals Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe reminisce about their Christmas past. Joe surprises everyone with a holiday-themed wardrobe request.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Irritable Vowel Syndrome
programme.desc: Learn what Q frequently eats for lunch during filming, why Murr hired a pastry chef to come to the set and what animals took part in a punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on the very first Impractical Jokers episode and discover what social superpower the Jokers now possess. Plus, find out which audio equipment is not used anymore and the true history around Joe's 'nosing'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Butterfly Crime Scene
programme.desc: Find out what classic phrase was uttered in this early episode that is still said today, and what unaired challenges almost made it to the show. Plus, the real backstory of Butterfly Crime Scene.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Starfart Macchiato
programme.desc: Find out what game the Jokers have played five times throughout the show's history, and how the crew got poison ivy. Plus, learn what game the Jokers played that had them asking for extra turns.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Irritable Vowel Syndrome

programme.desc: Learn about Murr and Sal's favourite sandwich, which Joker is certified in CPR and what gift Murr received when the show first started.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pick a Loser
programme.desc: Find out which Joker was arrested in a foreign country and why the Jokers filmed at Madison Square Park often in the early days. Plus, learn the camera crew's motto.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Back to the Big Dig
programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael reboots a living skeleton, an instant pet trap, a flipping mermaid and more, all with brand-new reactions.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to Back in Time
programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael revisits a spirits-drinking spirit, a living fossil, rewrites history again and more with brand-new reactions.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to Fight or Flight
programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael reanimates a chameleon fish, reboots lengthy corks, remakes the airport bird man, and more with all-new reactions.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to the Ice
programme.desc: Michael rehashes a potato laser, re-designs an emergen-suit, and takes another shot on the ice and more.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Essence of the Wings
programme.desc: Michael turns leftovers into beauty products at a soap shop, and at a record store, he shows a hip-hop fan how to jump around. Plus, at a children's store, Michael's co-worker learns about the dangers of babysitting.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Relax the Back
programme.desc: Michael shocks people with every trick in the book, including a voice controlled page turner and outfit changes that almost get him recognized. And later, Michael amazes a trainee with a weightless mattress.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vegan Plant
programme.desc: Michael feeds a cannibalistic plant at a garden center, and at the tuxedo store, he sells a tie that literally suits itself. Plus, at a hockey rink, Michael's assistant is speechless with a trick so electric it melts the ice.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Sorcery or Science
programme.desc: Michael sweetens a woman's day at a candy store when a chocolate bunny eats her ring, and at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, he inflates pretzels at a snack stand. Plus, one of Michael's tricks gets flushed down the tubes.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: While working in a cheese store, Michael milks the reaction of a woman stunned by breeding brie. Later, Michael nails down the perfect app in a salon and unpacks a trick in an airport that ruffles his assistant's feathers.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dummy Talks
programme.desc: At an appliance store, a man goes bananas over Michael's self-stocking fridge. Then, Michael speeds up the life cycle of a frog in a science lab, and he pulls the strings at an estate sale when a haunted doll toys with his assistant.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Outrageous Surprises

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Outrageous Antics

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Swim Shady

programme.desc: There's a right way to be single, a wrong way to be single and then there's Alice.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Paris, Puppies and Pranks
programme.desc: As concerns begin to grow over the Coronavirus, Kim and Kourtney head to Paris for the Yeezy season 8 launch. Kris and Corey welcome a new puppy, and Khloé and Scott’s prank on Kris continues taking yet another turn.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Journey to Healing
programme.desc: Scott experiences some troubling health issues and Kim heads to Washington to meet with some formerly incarcerated women. Khloe is determined to cure Kim of her fear of spiders.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Trouble in Palm Springs
programme.desc: After months of tension among the sisters, Kris plans a getaway to Palm Springs for her daughters to bond, but a major fight between Kendall and Kylie derails the trip.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Sister, Sister and a Babymoon
programme.desc: Khloe takes her bestie on one last trip before her due date, but worries that some issues with Malika’s baby daddy might send her friend into early labor. The family deals with the fallout of Kendall and Kylie’s big fight in Palm Springs.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Things Fall Apart: Covid-19
programme.desc: As L.A. prepares for a potential lockdown, Khloe falls ill and worries that she may have Covid-19. Malika goes into labor and cannot bring her support system to the hospital.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Losing it in Lockdown
programme.desc: Kim struggles to balance work life and mom life in quarantine, while Khloe gets creative to keep herself entertained. The family encourages Kendall and Kylie to reconcile after their argument in Palm Springs.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Love Lockdown
programme.desc: Khloe feels pressured to make a decision about her romantic future with Tristan. Scott heads to a treatment center to work on his health, but is betrayed when the facility leaks photos of him.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Three Daughters, Three Problems
programme.desc: Terry’s eldest daughter Rachel’s new real estate career needs help, Lacey’s husband doesn’t want to move to Texas and Erin has been keeping a secret from him about a recent change to her appearance.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Terry Is in a Jam
programme.desc: The Bradshaw clan travels to Dallas as Terry is hosting (and driving in) the big Monster Jam truck rally. When Terry suffers from a panic attack, an old sibling rivalry is forced to come to a head.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Mr. Wrong
programme.desc: Rachel is with the wrong guy and everyone in the family can see it but her. While Terry and Zurie get payback on Tammy after years of her pranks, Lacey and Noah consider moving back to Texas to be closer to family.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: Terry is invited to Washington D.C. to sing with Rob Gronkowski at the USO. While he brings his family along to meet the troops, Rachel gets her mojo back and falls for a marine.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Quarantine Crazy
programme.desc: As the Coronavirus pandemic grips the nation, Terry invites the family to hunker down with him at the ranch, driving everyone crazy.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Man Problems
programme.desc: Terry and the girls get involved in Rachel’s love life, resulting in a competition to find her Mr. Right. The family tries to talk Terry out of agreeing to be a potential spokesperson for a certain product.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Fit For The Fastlane
programme.desc: Terry prepares to announce at a NASCAR race, which will be his first public appearance since the pandemic started. Wanting to look his best, he tries getting back into shape while trying to convince Rachel to sing at the speedway.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Oui Oui Terr-y
programme.desc: Tammy grows suspicious of Terry’s romantic anniversary surprise trip to Paris. Meanwhile, Zurie joins in on the Bradshaw family tradition and finds her passion for showing horses.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Top Chef
programme.desc: Terry and Tammy attempt one last time to try and convince Lacey and Noah to move to Texas by offering to buy them a restaurant. Meanwhile, Rachel introduces her new guy to the family by pulling a major prank on Terry.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Three Daughters, Three Solutions
programme.desc: Join Terry Bradshaw and his family as they navigate life.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Delivery: All-Star Holiday
programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri recruit three all-star chefs to play holiday games in their home kitchens. The Fieris send groceries and an oversized stocking filled with holiday sweets that the chefs must incorporate into two different seasonal dishes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Delivery: All-Star Hanukkah
programme.desc: Duff Goldman takes on two all-star chefs in GGG's first Hanukkah competition at home. Guy and Hunter Fieri challenge the chefs to make potato latkes with ingredients decided by dreidels. Then they have to turn eight leftover ingredients into a meal.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Spicy to Icy
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's heating up with some spice and cooling off with some ice. In Palm Springs, Calif., a barbecue joint pilin' up the meats and firin' up their 'flamethrower.'

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Smokin' Hot BBQ
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into all kinds of 'cue on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, a funky chicken joint is cranking the rotisserie and firing up the ribs. In Burlington, Vermont, a place is smokin' their wings and mashin' up their bomb BBQ with righteous ramen.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Home Delivery
programme.desc: Guy meets virtually with four chefs who walk him through one of their dishes with ingredients they've sent him. In this episode there's primo pork from New Hampshire, California chicken parm, Minneapolis pizza and tuna all the way from Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Family Style
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy is taking a seat at some family restaurants. He stops at a sibling-run Vietnamese place in Utah serving authentic dishes using family recipes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Deep Fried All-Stars
programme.desc: Deep fried dishes have been all over the map on DDD. You won't want to miss these fried beauties, from classics to off the wall righteousness.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real-Deal Diners
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's traveling the country hitting up real-deal diners. From coast to coast and everywhere in-between, these all-American staples are servin' up the bomb breakfasts and classic comfort food, with a few surprises mixed into the menu.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Knockout Burger Joints
programme.desc: Guy's hitting up classic, real-deal burger joints. From California to New Jersey, Minnesota to Oklahoma, it's all about the all-American favorite.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Amazing Asian
programme.desc: Guy Fieri crosses the Pacific without ever leaving the states with a Korean, Japanese, Vietnamese, Thai and Asian fusion cuisine adventure.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Tikis and Tinsel
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is inspired to do some holiday entertaining, and to celebrate the completion of her backyard tiki bar, she's hosting a retro cocktail party complete with tiki torches, Polynesian-inspired bites and plenty of tinsel.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: One-Pan Winter
programme.desc: The temperature's dropping, and Ree Drummond is cooking up one-pan wonders with a wintry twist. She makes creamy Italian one-pan pasta, the simplest baked pancetta and butternut risotto, a cozy white lasagna soup and an inspired chicken.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: How The Cookie Crumbles
programme.desc: Ree bakes four cookies to share with friends and family on cookie day. She makes browned butter sugar cookies, chocolate chip cookies with bacon and caramel corn and no-bake cookies with grains, seeds, fruits and nuts.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Christmas Cocktail Party
programme.desc: Ree has invited a crowd of friends and family over to Drummond Ranch for a festive holiday get-together that she's putting together in no time at all.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Christmas Is Coming
programme.desc: Ree whips up a cozy and casual rigatoni and meatballs, holiday bacon appetizers, and incredible chocolate mint brownie bites.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Farm Fry Dinner
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is having a fry-out on the farm, and things are getting deliciously crispy. She makes juicy buttermilk fried chicken, a roasted broccoli and grape salad and colorful harissa carrots and ranch.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Christmas Eve Dinner
programme.desc: Trisha and her sister prepare their Christmas Eve dinner of honey mustard glazed ham, grits, and green casserole with sautéed parsnips and carrots before heading to church.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Best of Barefoot Comfort: Weekend Breakfast
programme.desc: Ina Garten shares her weekend breakfast classics and mixes her new favorite breakfast cocktail, an ultimate bloody mary. There's all-in-one roast beef hash, restaurant-style eggs benedict and make-ahead raspberry baked french toast.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Holiday Brunch
programme.desc: Ina Garten is sharing recipes and pro tips for putting together a gorgeous seasonal brunch. She starts with shakshuka with feta, the perfect way to serve eggs to a crowd, and bakes a batch of make-ahead morning glory muffins.

programme.title: The Kitchen: 'Appy Holidays
programme.desc: The Kitchen is serving up bright ideas for sweet and savory bites perfect for any holiday party. Sunny Anderson creates a DIY carving station with her easy beef tenderloin with holiday pesto.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: A Classic Christmas
programme.desc: Host Jesse Palmer asks the five bakers to create an over-the-top version of a holiday trifle. Then, the classics continue in the main heat when the competitors make the ultimate Charlotte royale for judges Nancy Fuller, Duff Goldman and Carla Hall.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge: Some Assembly Required Christmas
programme.desc: The cookie makers are asked to create two cookies on sticks: one representing the best part of Christmas for kids, and another, the best part for adults. Later, they must craft life-size Christmas stockings out of cookies and incorporate winter fruits.

programme.desc: Alan and Walden befriend three moms at a kids' gym but things get complicated when Walden becomes attracted to one of them. Meanwhile, Alan goes out for a girls' night with a group of moms.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Family, Bublé, Deep-Fried Turkey
programme.desc: Walden and Alan are determined to convince their foster child, Louis, that Santa Claus is real.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Bouncy, Bouncy, Bouncy, Lyndsey
programme.desc: Walden discovers how challenging it is to be intimate with women with his foster son, Louis, in the house. Also, Herb asks Alan if he can go on a date with Lyndsey.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Here I Come, Pants!
programme.desc: Alan takes it upon himself to help Walden keep Louis after the social worker discovers he and Walden are not really a gay couple.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: For Whom the Booty Calls
programme.desc: Walden joins a group for adoptive fathers and finds it to be a nice escape from Alan.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Beer-Battered Rip-Off

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Boompa Loved His Hookers

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: One False Move, Zimbabwe

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: On Vodka, on Soda, on Blender, on Mixer!

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: One and a Half Men

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: A Decent Proposal

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: How I Hate Your Mother

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: White Like Me

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Heart Attack
programme.desc: Sophia suffers an apparent heart attack and the girls nervously await the paramedics.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Stan's Return
programme.desc: Dorothy's ex-husband, Stan shows up to settle a piece of land they bought on their honeymoon. This leads to Dorothy and Stan spending the night together. Meanwhile, Rose and Blanche plan a vacation that Sophia is not invited on.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Custody Battle
programme.desc: Dorothy's sister, Gloria, comes to Miami for a visit and asks Sophia to come live with her in California. Meanwhile, Blanche is furious when Rose is cast as Lady Macbeth in a local play, and not her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Little Romance
programme.desc: Rose has been dating Dr. Jonathan Newman and begins to think their relationship is leading to the altar. However she begins to have second thoughts especially since he's a midget.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Was No Lady

programme.title: The Golden Girls: In a Bed of Rose's

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Truth Will Out
programme.desc: Rose is apprehensive about a visit from her daughter and granddaughter, since their reason for coming is to settle Rose's late-husband's will. Meanwhile, Blanche gets caught up in the tabloids of a society murder.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Nice and Easy

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Operation
programme.desc: Dorothy is hesitant about having foot surgery just as she was scheduled to tap dance with Blanche and Rose at a dance recital.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Second Motherhood

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Adult Education
programme.desc: Blanche's psychology professor sexually harasses her when she goes to him for help on a difficult test. Blanche's professor makes her a harassing deal: If she has sex with him, he'll give her an 'A' for the exam.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Flu Attack (aka The Flu)

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Job Hunting
programme.desc: When Rose loses her job at the grief center, she begins searching for other sources of work. Meanwhile, Blanche tries to lose a few pounds and Dorothy is excited when a man she once had a crush on asks her out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blind Ambitions
programme.desc: Rose's sister, Lily, can't accept the fact that now that she's blind, she needs help.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Missing Mama
programme.desc: The vet team must find a solution when mama baboon Qetesh's baby struggles with separation anxiety. Beloved seal Tarwin gives keeper Jose a big scare, and keeper Mark steps in as a surrogate for beautiful little Betsy.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Malu's Way or the Highway
programme.desc: The games begin for keepers when orangutan Malu destroys his playroom. An elderly horse must undergo a risky procedure, and keepers must decide if it's time to say goodbye to one of the zoo's most beloved giraffes.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: What to Do When Expecting
programme.desc: A routine health check takes a frightening turn for lion brothers Lwazi and Ato. Keepers anxiously await to see if otter couple Odie and Paula are expecting, and a gorilla called Kanzi must prove she can receive vital medical care.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Saving Daisy
programme.desc: A team races to save a wombat named Daisy suffering from mysterious health issues before it's too late. Keepers Georgie and Luke venture on a challenging road trip to transport a giraffe calf, and a secret hidden underneath the Melbourne Zoo is revealed.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Moving Day Dilemma
programme.desc: Keepers become concerned when the big move for lion brothers Lwazi and Ato is delayed. Young rhino Kifaru is challenged during a mating ritual, and a brilliant plan saves the endangered mountain pygmy possums.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Surgery in the Savannah
programme.desc: In the savannah, Dr. Bonnie must perform a critical surgery on zebra Zaide's badly damaged tail. Tiger Indrah gets an incredible tenth birthday surprise, and Dr. Sarah is determined to solve spider monkey Isobella's medical mystery.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Navigating a New Normal
programme.desc: In order to navigate the COVID-19 global pandemic, the staff must ensure proper care for their animals. Keepers spring into action when urgent dental surgery is needed for elderly tiger Binjai, and a family of cotton top tamarin monkeys must be relocated.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Miska's Big Reveal
programme.desc: Vet Leanne races to rescue critically injured koalas from Australia's blazing bushfires. A two-tonne rhino calf named Kipenzi wreaks havoc in the zoo trucks, and the carnivore team eagerly awaits to see if snow leopard Miska reveals an exciting secret.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Overcoming Obstacles
programme.desc: Injured elephant, Man-Jai, desperately needs emergency tusk surgery, while a massive clean-up operation begins for a family of hippos. A bent beak jeopardizes a couple of lovebird penguins, and a strange resident gets VIP treatment.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: What to Do When Expecting

programme.title: North Woods Law: Dirty Habits
programme.desc: Parker investigates a rotting bear carcass that was dumped on the side of the road, leading him on a hunt across Maine to find a potential poacher. Blanchard catches a couple behaving badly on a wildlife refuge. Robertson rescues some ducklings.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Catcher in the Wild
programme.desc: A speeding dirt biker eludes Warden Robertson, but leaves a crucial clue to his whereabouts. Two dogs on the loose are chasing newborn deer. An ATV accident victim has an odd explanation for what caused his crash.

programme.title: North Woods Law: And the Little Ones Too
programme.desc: The discovery of a dead beaver in a Skowhegan parking lot leads Warden Parker on an exhaustive investigation involving surveillance cameras, anonymous informants and the assistance of the local police.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Under the Radar
programme.desc: Officer Canfield breaks up a 45-year-old illegal fishing tournament. Officer MacFadzen rescues an injured hawk. Officer Hannett confronts two kids riding OHRVs on the road. On Mt. Chocorua, officers rescue a woman with a fractured ankle.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Dawn Patrol
programme.desc: Pre-dawn on opening day of rifle season, Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett pursue a night hunter. While up north, Officers Canfield and St. Pierre battle the snow to work a deer decoy. And in the city, Officer Frye wrestles an aggressive wild turkey.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Frozen Over
programme.desc: Officer Hannett patrols for ice fishermen while Lt. Boudreau investigates a hunter who shot towards a road. Officer Holmes deals with a raccoon hiding in a warm chimney. And later, Officer St. Pierre goes on his first dive recovery under the ice.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Out of Options
programme.desc: Officer Cyrs gets a call about a rabid fox that attacked a homeowner. Officer Crouse tracks down a group of ATV riders. Lt. Murphy talks to a farmer about a nuisance bear. Officers Frye and Jones investigate a hunter that may have shot from the road.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Bump in the Road
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett have an unusually busy day on ATV patrol. Officer McDermott investigates a man who illegally shot a rabbit in a residential area. Officers Holmes and Cyrs use ATVs to rescue an injured hiker on Mount Carter.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Running Out of Time

programme.title: Bigfoot Is Real: Giant Swamp Creature
programme.desc: Gulf Coast Bigfoot Research Organization (GCBRO) founders Bobby Hamilton and Jim Lansdale lead a team of commandos on a mission to find and kill a Bigfoot in order to prove its existence to science and protect the public from a future attack.

programme.title: Bigfoot Is Real: Demon Monkeys
programme.desc: The GCBRO responds to possible sightings of a dead Bigfoot and terrifying devil-monkeys. Controversy erupts over whether to kill or not at a Bigfoot gathering, and the crew have an exciting chase through the forest at night.

programme.desc: Gulf Coast Bigfoot Research Organization (GCBRO) founders Bobby Hamilton and Jim Lansdale lead a team of commandos on a mission to find and kill a Bigfoot in order to prove its existence to science and protect the public from a future attack.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle: Alaska's Most Haunted Building and Curse of the Kushtaka
programme.desc: An aggressive spirit attacks guests at a historic hotel in Juneau, Alaska, and a shapeshifting menace could be responsible for thousands of abductions in the Alaska Triangle.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle: Alaskan Bigfoot and Mysterious Forcefields of the Triangle
programme.desc: A cryptozoologist hunts for scientific proof of Bigfoot in the remote Alaskan wilderness, and experts investigate a mysterious vortex of energy that may be behind unexplained disappearances and paranormal activity in the Alaska Triangle.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle: The Secrets of Mount Hayes
programme.desc: An eyewitness shares startling video evidence of extraterrestrial activity in Fairbanks, Alaska, and a UFO hunter flies over Alaska's highest mountain in search of a secret underground alien base.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle: Alaskan Underwater UFOs and Ghost Ships
programme.desc: Compelling evidence suggests visitors from another planet are hiding in the unexplored depths of the ocean. Experts investigate the reports of ghost ships haunting the high seas around Alaska.

programme.title: Below Deck: The Champagne Campaign
programme.desc: It's the final night of the charter season and tensions within the crew are running high. All departments are working overtime as Timothy Sykes micromanages the crew to execute the perfect surprise for his guests. Jen attempts to be on her best behavior.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: A literature student falls for a wealthy young entrepreneur, who makes clear that any relations between the two of them will be on his own terms. She soon comes to learn of his singular tastes and his need to be completely in control.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: Christian approaches Ana and asks her to give him a second chance. She agrees with one condition: this time, there isn't going to be any rules or punishments. They start to build trust, but figures from Christian's past threaten to tear them apart.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Freed
programme.desc: Ana Steel and Christian Grey's fledgling marriage is threatened by jealously when his former lover works her way back into his life, but lurking beyond that is an even greater threat in the form of Ana's disgraced former employer who's out for revenge.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Freed
programme.desc: Ana Steel and Christian Grey's fledgling marriage is threatened by jealously when his former lover works her way back into his life, but lurking beyond that is an even greater threat in the form of Ana's disgraced former employer who's out for revenge.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey: What a Difference a Plea Makes
programme.desc: Teresa Giudice and her husband, Joe, fight to keep their family intact as they embark on a very public legal battle for their freedom. Fortunately Teresa has support from her sister-in-law Melissa, and veteran housewife Dina Manzo.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey: Oh, Christmas Tre
programme.desc: Melissa tries to keep Christmas traditions alive, despite living in a rental home, while Dina feels more alone than ever as her daughter Lexi applies for college. Meanwhile, Teresa's legal woes still hang heavy over her family's heads.

programme.title: Below Deck: I’m Also a Boat Captain!
programme.desc: Rhylee's outburst with Chandler puts her at odds with the entire Deck Team. Meanwhile, Kate and Josiah comfort an emotionally broken Caroline after she receives some devastating news from back home.

programme.title: Below Deck: B*tch in Charge
programme.desc: Captain Lee worries that Chandler is mismanaging his deck team after hearing some unsettling news. Ross confronts Rhylee after she oversteps her boundaries. Meanwhile, Caroline feels left out vents her frustrations to Kate.

programme.title: Below Deck: Naked Smoothies
programme.desc: Rhylee and Chandler continue to be at odds. The crew welcome a group of social media obsessed Silicon Valley investors. Caroline wakes up with a mysterious foot injury and has difficulty pulling her weight, and Kate struggles with the guests.

programme.title: Below Deck: Get Better or Go Home
programme.desc: As Chandler’s decision making frustrates the deck crew, Rhylee and Ashton grow desperate for a change at bosun. The charter guests overcome their fears by swimming with some scary ocean predators.

programme.title: Below Deck: New Kids on the Dock
programme.desc: The crew welcomes aboard their largest group of charter guests yet, including two young children, posing new challenges for everyone. While Chef Adrian jumps through hoops to please all their preferences, Chandler tries to redeem himself.

programme.title: Below Deck: Flesh Wounds are not Five Star
programme.desc: Chandler is left at odds with Captain Lee and the entire Deck Team when an oversight leaves the charter guests stranded at an off-boat excursion without basic amenities.

programme.title: Below Deck: Insult to Injury
programme.desc: Captain Lee comes to a decision about restructuring the deck team, while Caroline is pushed to make a decision regarding her place. Ashton proves to be a ladies' man on a night out, while Rhylee ruffles some feathers with Adrian.

programme.title: Below Deck: Man Overboard
programme.desc: My Seanna struggles to pull off a successful Charter on the heels of two dramatic exits from crew members, Chandler and Caroline. Tensions rise as newly-appointed bosun, Ross, finds himself at odds with an easily-riled Rhylee.

programme.title: Below Deck: Let Them Eat Chicken!
programme.desc: The aftermath of Ashton's accident has the entire crew shaken up, especially Captain Lee. While the deck crew is on edge with a man down, Laura struggles to fall in line with her third stew role and her boss Kate.

programme.title: Below Deck: Check Yourself!
programme.desc: Adrian is confused by Laura's flirtatious advances after she crashes with Ashton in the crow's nest. Meanwhile, Rhylee gets fired up when Ross tells Tyler he'd be doing him a favour by hooking up with her. Laura and Kate have a screaming match.

programme.title: Below Deck: 'I Said I Got It!'
programme.desc: Kate deals with Laura's insubordination after being told to 'check' herself. Ross is at his wits end with Rhylee's attitude after she confronts him once again about feeling like the low man on the totem pole.

programme.title: Below Deck: All That Glitters Isn't Gold
programme.desc: The Crew's wild evening out prompts a passionate, late-night tryst for Rhylee and Tyler, but there's trouble in paradise for Ashton and Laura. As the Team's eighth Charter begins, childhood insecurities resurface for Josiah.

programme.title: Movie: Minions
programme.desc: Years before lending their skills to Gru in 'Despicable Me,' the Minions are in need of a new villainous master to serve. In 1960s New York City, they find just what they're looking for: the world's first-ever female supervillain.

programme.title: Movie: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: Former villain Gru reconnects with his long-lost and far more successful twin brother Dru for one last heist: stealing a diamond from another supervillain, former child star Balthazar Bratt who is obsessed with the character that he played in his youth.

programme.title: Movie: Trolls

programme.title: Counting Cars: Muscle Memory
programme.desc: Kevin is won over by a hotrod pick-up truck. Danny tracks down a customer's original 1969 Firebird, but its terrible condition may make it impossible to restore, and an unannounced visitor causes drama at the shop.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Major League Muscle
programme.desc: Rick looks to turn a 1962 mini-Corvette into a racing ragtop. A 1950s coin operated mustang ride hoofs it into the shop in the hopes that Rick can restore it.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Return of the Big Twin
programme.desc: Ryan works on a secret project for Bones Legacy while Mike and Roli are blinded by a Chevy Impala that redefines 'lowrider.'

programme.title: Counting Cars: Firebird Fever
programme.desc: 'Engine Whisperer' Doc has a cool '67 Firebird he's been working on. While he's a mechanical maestro under the hood, his paint skills are lacking so he enlists Ryan to make it look as mean as it will run. Danny checks out a one-of-a-kind car collection.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Flamin' and Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Danny wants Ryan to fix a bad flame job on his beloved police cruiser that's been sitting in the shop for years. A customer asks Shannon to restore his 1979 Iron Head Sportster that's more a pile of parts than a bike.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Better Late Than Never
programme.desc: Shannon recruits the guys to help him finish up a gift for Danny: a bike he started building for him 10 years ago. Ryan works to keep Danny out of the shop so that Shannon can finish the bike, and winds up buying a sweet Baja Bug in the process.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Fast and the Ridiculous Part One
programme.desc: Ryan, Mike and Shannon convince Danny to sponsor them in a 24-hour endurance race called The LeMons. This race pits cheap hunks of junk against each other deep in the Arizona desert. Meanwhile, Danny has the guys work on a special one of a kind project.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Fast and the Ridiculous Part Two
programme.desc: The guys finally find a not so perfect car for the Arizona Lemons race; a beat up old racer, once owned by Shannon. With a little begging and very little cash they buy it back. Next they resurrect the Junker as the 'Counts Bloody Mess.'

programme.title: Counting Cars: Heavy Metal Caddy
programme.desc: Brann Dailor, drummer for the Grammy-winning heavy metal band Mastodon, brings in his 1970 Cadillac Coupe DeVille for some much-needed Counts Kustoms love.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Count's Calendar
programme.desc: The huge photo shoot day for the Count's Kustoms calendar is approaching. Danny has decided to have his guys each find, and take a picture with, their dream car for the back cover.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Count of Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Danny must give up his prized 1972 Monte Carlo for one of his biggest clients and is counting on his team to get the job done in one week. Meanwhile, Ryan and Mike go for the ride of their lives in a 1965 Fastback Mustang.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Finders Keepers
programme.desc: Danny acquires a '74 Ford f100 he can't wait to trick out and flip for a big profit. But after the Count falls in love with the truck and decides he wants to keep it, Kevin must sell it before Danny catches on.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Get Your Motor Running
programme.desc: Danny and Shannon are in motorcycle heaven when they are asked to restore a rare 1957 Harley Davidson Pan head prototype.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Low Riding Lincoln
programme.desc: Danny and Ryan have big plans for a low riding Lincoln. Lonnie, one of the shop's long time painters, wants to give his Lincoln lowrider a new, but simple, paint job but that's not going to happen.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Big Truck Custom Combo
programme.desc: Danny is commissioned to custom paint a brand new pick-up for a charity auction for the local YMCA. But Danny can't stop at paint, he adds the ultimate accessory a matching chopper that fits in the back.

programme.title: Counting Cars: GTO Dreams
programme.desc: Ryan and Ghetto Bob buy a '67 Pontiac GTO, but Danny might not let it go. Plus, former Guns N' Roses guitarist DJ Ashba drops off his latest super car.

programme.desc: Paige invites a group of deserving kids to Vuuugle to celebrate the holidays with Bizaardvark.

programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve and the Baxter/ Grayson family are trying to make the best of the holiday when a storm hits and disrupts their plans to celebrate together at a cabin on the lake. Snowed in at three different places, they all must lean on each other.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Face of My Torturer
programme.desc: William Knorr's mother, Theresa, always threatened that if she ever went to jail for what she had done, she would take him down with her. After years spent helping her keep the horrors secret, could he ever escape or would he wind up like all the others?

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Something Wasn't Right
programme.desc: Beverly Stephens knew something wasn't right with her husband, Reginald Brooks, but never thought there was a killer inside him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: They Let Him Out

programme.desc: Each team given 500-dollar budget to find, fix up, and flip items purchased at New York's Stormville Airport Flea Market. In one hour.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Young Hipsters vs. Old School Design

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Rebuilding The Old Schoolhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of Cabin Masters hike through the woods of Dedham, ME, to restore a dilapidated family camp that was once the old schoolhouse. A serious case of rot threatens to close down the entire project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: After three women collectively buy a cabin they describe as 'a diamond in the rough on a pretty lot,' they are determined to prove the naysayers wrong and create the cabin of their dreams.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: It Takes a Village
programme.desc: Founded in 1935, Agassiz Village has provided underprivileged and at-risk kids an opportunity to experience camp. Chase and his team take on a big project with a small budget to help the camp with the support of the community.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Deep Fried Paradise 4

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Colorado Sweets
programme.desc: Colorado has some amazing sweets. Head to High Point Creamery in Denver from some unusual ice cream flavors like lemon ice pop with raspberry swirl and earl grey tea with shortbread.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Savory Sweets
programme.desc: Sweet and savory flavors are such an irresistible combination. We visit three sweet and savory hot spots including Aiko Pops in Denver, where ice pops come in radical flavors like raspberry and sweet corn.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Ice Cream Nation
programme.desc: At Morgentern's Finest Ice Cream in New York, inventive flavors and unusual toppings take center stage.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Awesome Asheville Sweets
programme.desc: At the speakeasy Nightbell, they take traditional Southern dishes, add a little culinary magic, and turn them into bite-sized morsels that will surprise and satisfy. The Hop creates some of the most unique and delicious ice cream flavors imaginable.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Boston Sweets

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Chocolate
programme.desc: When it comes to sweets, chocolate is king. And it inspires chefs to reach new heights with amazingly chocolatey dishes.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: A Day of Comfort Food
programme.desc: Comfort food enthusiast Eddie Jackson runs down a day full of the best comfort food in the world, starting with an indulgent brioche French toast breakfast and an over-the-top sweet and savory brunch. He then grabs hot dogs and hamburgers for lunch.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Superstuffed
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shares a day's worth of foods that are jam-packed, crammed full and super stuffed with the tastiest, most delicious flavors imaginable.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Buttered Up
programme.desc: Chefs and food experts are revealing the richest, creamiest buttery dishes out there. Alex Guarnaschelli brings on the butter with a one-of-a-kind shrimp-and-grits combo from Tillie's in Short Hills, New Jersey.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Worth the Wait
programme.desc: Alton Brown talks up his favorite beef Wellington, while Jamika Pessoa melts over buttery biscuits.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feats Of Meat
programme.desc: Chefs share the most mouth-watering meat dishes they've ever eaten.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Life Changers
programme.desc: We're revealing all the unforgettable dishes that changed our lives.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Alaska's Inside Passage
programme.desc: Andrew gets a whole new taste of Alaska when he visits the Inside Passage. Andrew finds out that people in this part of Alaska are still making the most of the bounty that nature has provided. He tries sea cucumbers, salmon eggs, and roasted fish heads.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Washington, D.C.
programme.desc: Explore the branches of the food scene in the nation's capital with Andrew Zimmern.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Bronx
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the international flavors of one of America's most diverse communities, the Bronx, New York. He finds Italian-influenced bites like dry-aged pork sausage, spicy Jamaican meat pastries and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Denver
programme.desc: Andrew explores the frontier fare of Denver, Colorado. From classic game meats remade for the modern palette to the signature green chilli sauce of Den-Mex cuisine, Denver has become the region's cultural hub with an abundance of top-shelf food.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Phoenix
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the multicultural cuisine of Phoenix, Ariz. A heavy Mexican influence is present throughout the restaurant scene in dishes like chilaquiles and pazole.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: London: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew highlights the iconic British dishes and ethnically diverse foods that have put London on the culinary map, from humble shepherd's pie and posh beef Wellington to sizzling seekh kebabs and smoky Jamaican jerk chicken.

programme.desc: The boys decide to put on a traditional family Christmas special featuring their family, friends and guests. Featuring new holiday songs including: Buford and Baljeet sing 'Good King Wenceslas' and the whole gang sings 'We Wish You a Merry Christmas.'

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Get That Bigfoot Outa My Face!/ Tree to Get Ready
programme.desc: Gang is off to a visit at Phineas and Ferb's grandparents at their lake house.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention
programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Write Turn Here
programme.desc: Hiro is forced to write a story for his class and decides to write a Big Hero 6 story. Meanwhile, strange versions of Noodle Burger Boy attack the team.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: A Friendly Face / Big Chibi 6
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: TRON: Uprising: Scars
programme.desc: Beck fights to get Tron to realize drezzing is not the answer to getting even with Dyson. More of Tron's history before the occupation is revealed.

programme.title: TRON: Uprising: Grounded
programme.desc: Tesler challenges the Renegade to a showdown in Argon Square, but Beck's plans to confront his nemesis are thwarted when Able angrily grounds him at the garage.

programme.title: TRON: Uprising: We Both Know How This Ends
programme.desc: While Abel is away, Mara is put in charge of the Garage and must prove her leadership skills when Pavel orders her to complete a nearly impossible task. If she fails, every one of her coworkers will be sent to The Games.

programme.title: TRON: Uprising: Tagged
programme.desc: The Renegade recruits three fearless supporters who have expressed their commitment to the revolution.

programme.title: DuckTales: Last Christmas!
programme.desc: Scrooge celebrates Christmas with his time-traveling ghost buddies while time-lost Dewey teams with Young Donald to find his mom on Christmas.

programme.title: DuckTales: The First Adventure!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: How Santa Stole Christmas!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Fight for Castle McDuck!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Rebirth! Master Devolos!
Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Chasing Memories, Creating Dreams!
programme.desc: The Alola Pokémon League is off to a rousing start, and emotions are running high in and out of Manalo Stadium!

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: DuckTales: Louie's Eleven!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: El Fuego
programme.desc: Professional mech-wrestler El Fuego is intent on becoming the toughest fighter in San Fransokyo and decides he must beat the strongest challenger he can find, Baymax.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: The Owl House: Adventures in the Elements
programme.desc: Luz needs to learn a new spell, so Eda takes her to the most magical place on the island to train.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: The Rise and Fall of Courtney Lynn
programme.desc: When Courtney Lynn farts in class, it disrupts the school's social structure and leads to Nice Nancy's rise in popularity.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Prank or Treat
programme.desc: The gang is in deep trouble after a prank they pull on Becky Snyder goes horribly wrong. Meanwhile, Dusty sends a target on a roller coaster ride while posing as a popular mascot for an Italian restaurant.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Bailey's Band
programme.desc: When Bailey finds out Courtney Lynn and the 'Three Courtneys' sign up to perform in the school talent show, she creates her own band to compete against them.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Blind Date
programme.desc: The gang finds out that Uncle Will has, unknowingly, been set up on a blind date with Bailey's mom. Meanwhile, a target is hired to be on-air talent for a home shopping network owned by Chance's dad.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: LOL the Vote
programme.desc: Chance is hoping to be voted 'class clown' for a record breaking fourth year in a row, but finds out Bailey is also vying for the title. Dusty is vying for 'most academic.'

programme.title: Walk the Prank: End of the World (Wide Web)
programme.desc: The gang is forced to endure reality for the first time when the city's internet goes down.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: The Alex Baldwin Blues Explosion
programme.desc: A team of young practical jokers pull off hilarious pranks in this hidden camera series.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Party at Gordy's
programme.desc: Chance tries to figure out why he's the only one of his friends invited to a classmate's party, while the gang pulls off a prank that makes Herman's creepy life-size doll appear to come to life just in time to scare a babysitter.

programme.title: South Park: Butterballs

programme.title: South Park: Cock Magic

programme.title: South Park: Lil' Crime Stoppers
programme.desc: After they return a missing doll to a little girl, the Park County Police Department recognizes the boys' efforts and names them Junior Deputies.

programme.title: South Park: Bebe's Boobs Destroy Society

programme.title: South Park: Fishsticks

programme.title: South Park: AWESOM-O
programme.desc: Cartman plans to learn all of Butters' innermost secrets and then use them against him, by pretending to be Butters' new best friend, a robot named AWESOM-O.

programme.desc: Cartman suddenly finds Stan, Kenny and Kyle too immature to be his friends. He then decides to seek friendship using the Internet, where he finds an older man who is more than willing to be his 'friend.'

programme.title: South Park: Cancelled
programme.desc: Stan, Cartman, Kyle and Kenny find out that planet Earth is just one big intergalactic reality show and it's about to be cancelled.

programme.title: South Park: Do the Handicapped Go to Hell?
programme.desc: The boys become obsessed with religion and redemption after they're scared by a sermon about Hell. Meanwhile, Saddam returns to Hell and tries to have Satan's new boyfriend 'taken care of.'

programme.title: South Park: Probably
programme.desc: When their church's answers aren't sufficient to sate the boys' fear, they break off from their church and Cartman takes on the role of evangelical preacher. Meanwhile in Hell, the feud between Chris and Saddam continues.

programme.title: Movie: Twelve Men of Christmas
programme.desc: When her boss and fiancé betray her, a New York public relations executive finds herself in a small Montana town. She soon discovers that, when it comes to matters of the heart, a small town is just as complicated as the big city.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Wish
programme.desc: A young woman makes her special holiday wish and must decide between a new love interest and an old friend.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Unwrapped
programme.desc: An ambitious yet pragmatic reporter learns the true meaning of Christmas when she investigates a millionaire who insists that all the gifts that arrive on Christmas Day in their town are from Santa.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Aunt
programme.desc: When a woman returns home to Tennessee two weeks before Christmas to take care of her niece and nephew while their parents are away, the last thing she expects is to reconnect with her childhood best friend.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: John Lennon Assassination
programme.desc: In 1980, the entire world was stunned by the murder of John Lennon. Was Mark Chapman a cold-blooded killer or a seriously deranged young man? We will backtrack through the lives of both men to set the scene through interviews and footage.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Missing Skelton Brothers
programme.desc: Three young brothers are reported missing the day after Thanksgiving. In a shocking twist, their daddy claims he gave them to an underground group -- but investigators say his story doesn’t add up.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Who Killed JonBenet Ramsey
programme.desc: Investigating a wide range of suspects and evidence in the killing of JonBenet, including the Ramsey's maid, and the man who portrayed Santa Claus at a holiday party, only days before JonBenet was found murdered.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Did Scott Peterson Murder Laci?
programme.desc: A tale of murder, adultery, courtroom drama, and ultimately the death penalty. The story of Scott and Laci Peterson as told by those who lived it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: Hunters stumble upon a scene that includes a skull and small bones, bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, and a strand of hair. Police determine a woman was stabbed to death, and reconstruct an image of her face to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Financial Downfall
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is found dead after what seems like a tragic, accidental fall over a cliff. After a closer look at photographs from the scene, police get a new, more sinister theory about the young woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Daughter's Journey
programme.desc: A woman still haunted by her mother's disappearance 20 years before, decides to investigate herself. She finds her mother's old diary and discovers a grisly family secret that could explain just what happened to her mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'em Up
programme.desc: When a bank president is found floating in a nearby lake, taped to a chair, forensic experts start piecing together the tape and discover a missing piece. It's this piece, and tips pouring in from residents, that will lead to a capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: A wealthy man goes missing, and leaves behind instructions in his will regarding what should be done if he died of violent circumstances, leading to believe he was aware his life was in danger.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.
